responseMessageContents.text:
This is the Render dashboard showing a new deployment of the IVX backend building/pushing right now. It says **"Deploying..."** and the health check is waiting for `api.ivxholding.com:10000/health` to return successful.

**Good news:** Render finally triggered a deploy after the GitHub push. The build is still running — it's in the "Deploying..." phase.

**What to do:** Wait 1–2 minutes for this deploy to finish and the health check to go green. The new deployment should pick up commit `000d52e` with the P0 AI fixes.

Want me to poll the health endpoint to catch the moment it flips to the new commit?
